subcodes.first_line: O ancient servant of the Ancient Beauty, may my spirit be offered up for His loved ones! That which thou didst write was noted, and whatsoever [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده قدیم جمال قدم روحی لاحبائه الفدا آنچه مرقوم نمودید ملحوظ شد و هرچه
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrdom of the Bab, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
